tasks.subject: Hard audit of founding spec + master plan index + Plan 01
tasks.notes: Audit ran via dispatched general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined (Path A adapted). Returned RED with 28 findings + DESIGN-RETHINK FLAG. Report at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_audit-report.md. Walkthrough produced amendment plan at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_amendments.md. Major outcome: Plan 01 splits into 01a/01b/01c.

tasks.subject: Terrain prep — git identity, accounts, age key, origin remote, context-file rewrite
tasks.notes: Pre-Batch-1 readiness session per Ricardo's pivot ('clean the terrain before pouring foundation'). Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_terrain-prep.md.

tasks.subject: Batch 1 — Apply spec + ADR + master index amendments (with terrain-prep corrections folded in)
tasks.notes: Three commits pushed to Gitea origin: dc5cbec (Batch 1a spec single-pass amendment), 5f126a7 (Batch 1b new ADR bodies 021bis/036/037), d5ebbf9 (Batch 1c master plan index split Plan 01 -> 01a/01b/01c). All 28 audit findings + 6 recommendations either landed or scheduled. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_batch-1-amendments.md.

tasks.subject: Build Aurora-styled HTML presentation of the AMENDED design
tasks.notes: Done in two commits c1b791d (v1) + e6a8eca (v2). 218.9 KB / 3409 lines final. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_aurora-html-presentation.md.

tasks.subject: Batch 2 — Write Plans 01a / 01b / 01c via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: Three commits pushed to Gitea origin: 7d588ed (Plan 01a foundation, 18 tasks ~3300 lines), 42c4c4a (Plan 01b mirrors+warm-standby, 12 tasks ~1750 lines), 508c160 (Plan 01c personas+hooks+smoke-test, 11 tasks ~2050 lines + master plan index README updated). Audit-finding inheritance: 01a closes C1/C2/F5/F10/F12/F13/F15/F16/F19/F21/F23/F26; 01b closes C4/F7/F22-subset/F24/F25; 01c closes C3/F8/F18/F20/F27/R2/R4. Coordination gates marked per plan (01a Tasks 12-18 gate on JP age pubkey; 01b Tasks 7-12 gate on physical second host). Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_batch-2-plan-writes.md.

tasks.subject: JP coordination items requested 2026-05-14 — awaiting reply
tasks.notes: Single Signal message sent to JP 2026-05-14 requesting: (1) age pubkey [t-jp-age-keypair], (2) OS choice [t-jp-os-confirmation], (3) Telegram chat_id, (4) Gitea username preference, (5) invite Ricardo to JP's existing Notion workspace, (6) GitHub username decision. JP has 10h/wk bandwidth — drip-feed expected over next few days.

tasks.subject: JP age keypair generation — awaiting Signal reply
tasks.notes: Per CRITICAL 2 fix. Subset of t-jp-coordination-2026-05-14. Message sent 2026-05-14 with full age-keygen recipe. Gates Plan 01a Tasks 12-18 (Tasks 1-11 are unblocked).

tasks.subject: JP machine OS confirmation — awaiting Signal reply
tasks.notes: Per F13. Subset of t-jp-coordination-2026-05-14. Recommending Linux Mint. F13 landed in spec §5; jp-heavy.yaml in Plan 01a Task 6 declares os: linux-mint.

tasks.subject: Verify Gitea bare-repo on-disk path for systemd path-watcher
tasks.notes: Resolved within Plan 01b Task 1 execution (path verification + 00_GOVERNANCE/system_map.md). Per terrain prep: /srv/gitea/data/git/repositories/nexostrat/nexostrat.git. Closes when 01b Task 1 commits.

tasks.subject: Batch 3 step 1 — Re-audit Plan 01a (independent risk-auditor pass)
tasks.notes: **NEXT SESSION ACTION** as of 2026-05-14 end. Same dispatch pattern as 2026-05-14 audit (general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined; or direct risk-auditor subagent). Target GREEN. If YELLOW with <=3 amendments, apply inline and proceed. If more, re-write affected tasks. Plan 01a at 00_META/plans/2026-05-14_plan-01a-foundation.md (18 tasks, ~3300 lines). Per amendment plan §Batch 3.

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01a — Foundation (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Execute via superpowers:subagent-driven-development. Tag v0.1a-foundation on completion. Tasks 1-11 unblocked once re-audit GREEN; Tasks 12-18 also gate on t-jp-age-keypair. Several deliverables already partly done in terrain prep — those become VERIFY tasks per Plan 01a Task 11.

tasks.subject: Batch 3 step 3 — Re-audit Plan 01b (after 01a executed)
tasks.notes: Same pattern as t-plan-01a-reaudit. 01a execution may have surfaced learnings worth folding in before 01b execute starts. Plan 01b at 00_META/plans/2026-05-14_plan-01b-mirrors.md (12 tasks, ~1750 lines).

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01b — Mirrors + warm-standby (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Tag v0.1b-mirrors on completion. Tasks 1-6 unblocked once re-audit GREEN; Tasks 7-12 also gate on physical second host (Linux Mint + Tailscale-joined). Pre-conditions partly in place from terrain prep: nexostrat GitHub + Codeberg accounts exist; SSH key registered; Gitea origin pushing.

tasks.subject: Batch 3 step 5 — Re-audit Plan 01c (after 01b executed)
tasks.notes: Same pattern. 01b execution may have surfaced learnings. Plan 01c at 00_META/plans/2026-05-14_plan-01c-personas.md (11 tasks, ~2050 lines).

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01c — Personas + hooks + integration test (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: Tag v0.1-foundation on completion (the original Plan 01 milestone, now reached at end of 01c). No coordination gates within the plan itself — 11 tasks runnable in a single ~4-6h session.

tasks.subject: Future amendment cycle — update spec §5 cost table to actual cost-sharing
tasks.notes: Spec §5 carries 'Anthropic API $20-60' to Ricardo. Reality (per Aurora HTML v2 + Plan 01a Task 9 cost-sharing-agreement.md): both founders pay Claude MAX at $200/mo each from personal subscriptions; Gemini free until ~Oct 2026; Notion + email + hosting + domain JP-personal; Drive + hardware Ricardo-personal. Firm-as-entity pays $0 Stage 1. Future amendment cycle should update §5 and add an ADR if needed.

tasks.subject: Write Plan 02 (Documentation System) in full task detail via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: Master-index header in 00_META/plans/README.md. Plan 02's drift hook becomes simpler now that Plan 01c's inliner script (per CRITICAL 3 fix) already exists. ~3 days execute after writing.
